rawContent: Task: 844-260409-113639 | Outcome: completed | Observation: Task 844-260409-113639 completed all 7 pipeline stages with 0 retries each, shipping PR #843 despite verify stage reporting FAIL due to typecheck errors in .next/dev/types/validator.ts involving PagesPageConfig type constraints. This is the sixth consecutive run exhibiting the identical pattern where verify-stage failures do not block deployment. The pipeline continues to function mechanically correctly (all stages complete, autofix runs, review-fix runs, ship executes) but lacks a critical gate that would halt progression when verification fails. No new insights were generated this run — the pattern is fully established and the recommendation from five prior retrospectives has not been implemented. | Pattern: This is the sixth consecutive run (832, 841, 260409-111824, 840, 842, 844) exhibiting the identical flaw: verify stage reports FAIL due to PagesPageConfig type constraint violations in .next/dev/types/validator.ts, yet the pipeline proceeds through review-fix and ship without blocking. Five prior retrospectives across three different days all recommended adding a conditional gate in ship to check verify exit status, but the flaw persists unchanged. The autofix stage cannot resolve this class of structural type errors, and the pipeline lacks a mechanism to halt when verify reports FAIL. | Suggestion: Implement the conditional gate in the ship stage that was recommended in five prior retrospectives without implementation: add a verifyExitCode check in the ship stage template that reads the verify stage's exit status and halts with an error when verify reports FAIL, preventing automatic shipment of code that failed typecheck validation. | Flaw: verify — Verify stage FAIL status does not prevent pipeline progression to ship stage | Stages: taskify:completed, plan:completed, build:completed, verify:completed, review:completed, review-fix:completed, ship:completed
